headline: TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd wins The Best Research Gemologist
standfirst: TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for The Best Research Gemologist, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd and the award record

TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of The Best Research Gemologist. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Kasun Madivila and Tourmaline sources identify TGL GemLab as founded by Kasun G. Madivila. The GBE archive records the research gemologist category. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.

The Best Research Gemologist recognition places TGL GemLab (Pvt) Ltd in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
